# agent-content-watermark-mcp

> Agent Content Watermark MCP — dedicated EU AI Act Article 50(2) GenAI watermarking. Visible + invisible + perceptual layers per the Code of Practice (2 Nov 2026 cliff). C2PA manifest envelope. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- generate_watermark
- verify_watermark
- attach_c2pa_manifest
- list_modalities
- code_of_practice_status
- sign_conformity_attestation

## Install
```
pip install agent-content-watermark-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/agent-content-watermark-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
